objective_contract: These terms and pass settings are fixed inputs for the Reactant/Enzyme original-objective recovery; optimizer settings may vary, but source data, loss terms, gases, weights, band mappings, and pass order may not.

longwave.transfer: radiative_transfer_lw with full upwelling and downwelling heating-rate calculation

terms.name: spectral_band_heating_rate
terms.description: Per-band squared heating-rate residual weighted by layer_weight and 86400^2.

terms.name: spectral_surface_down_flux
terms.description: Per-band surface downwelling flux residual weighted by flux_weight.

terms.name: spectral_toa_up_flux
terms.description: Per-band TOA upwelling flux residual weighted by flux_weight.

terms.name: interior_flux_profile
terms.description: Interior upwelling and downwelling profile residuals weighted by flux_profile_weight and interface weights.

terms.name: broadband_heating_rate
terms.description: Broadband heating-rate residual formed after summing over bands and blended by broadband_weight.

terms.name: broadband_boundary_flux
terms.description: Broadband surface-down and TOA-up residuals formed after summing over bands.

terms.name: spectral_boundary_flux
terms.description: Optional g-point surface-down and TOA-up boundary residuals weighted by spectral_boundary_weight.

terms.name: relative_reference_flux_subtraction
terms.description: Optional subtraction of relative-to CKD fluxes before evaluating residuals.

shortwave.transfer: radiative_transfer_direct_sw or radiative_transfer_norayleigh_sw; heating-rate objective uses downwelling flux only

terms.name: shortwave_transfer_branch
terms.description: Direct shortwave transfer for zero albedo; no-Rayleigh two-stream branch for reflective surfaces.

terms.name: downwelling_only_heating_rate
terms.description: Heating-rate residual is computed from downwelling fluxes only in the CKD objective.

terms.name: spectral_band_heating_rate
terms.description: Per-band squared heating-rate residual weighted by layer_weight and 86400^2.

terms.name: spectral_surface_down_flux
terms.description: Per-band surface downwelling flux residual weighted by flux_weight.

terms.name: spectral_toa_up_flux_20x
terms.description: Per-band TOA upwelling residual weighted by flux_weight with the official 20x multiplier.

terms.name: interior_flux_profile
terms.description: Interior upwelling and downwelling profile residuals weighted by flux_profile_weight and interface weights.

terms.name: broadband_heating_rate
terms.description: Broadband heating-rate residual formed after summing over bands and blended by broadband_weight.

terms.name: broadband_surface_down_flux
terms.description: Broadband surface-down residual formed after summing over bands.

terms.name: spectral_boundary_surface_down_flux
terms.description: Optional g-point surface-down residual weighted by spectral_boundary_weight.

terms.name: relative_reference_flux_subtraction
terms.description: Optional subtraction of relative-to CKD fluxes before evaluating residuals.

longwave.selected_common_options: COMMON_OPTIONS="prior_error=8.0 broadband_weight=0.8 flux_profile_weight=0.2 temperature_corr=0.8 pressure_corr=0.8 conc_corr=0.8 spectral_boundary_weight=0.1"

passes.training: ckdmip_evaluation1_lw_fluxes_rel-180.h5  ckdmip_evaluation1_lw_fluxes_rel-280.h5 ckdmip_evaluation1_lw_fluxes_rel-415.h5  ckdmip_evaluation1_lw_fluxes_rel-560.h5 ckdmip_evaluation1_lw_fluxes_rel-1120.h5 ckdmip_evaluation1_lw_fluxes_rel-2240.h5

ckdmip_evaluation1_lw_fluxes_present.h5  ckdmip_evaluation1_lw_fluxes_ch4-350.h5 ckdmip_evaluation1_lw_fluxes_ch4-700.h5  ckdmip_evaluation1_lw_fluxes_ch4-1200.h5 ckdmip_evaluation1_lw_fluxes_ch4-2600.h5 ckdmip_evaluation1_lw_fluxes_ch4-3500.h5

shortwave.selected_common_options: COMMON_OPTIONS="prior_error=2.0 broadband_weight=0.4 flux_weight=0.4 flux_profile_weight=0.1 temperature_corr=0.8 pressure_corr=0.8 conc_corr=0.8 max_iterations=2000 bounded_optimization=0"

passes.training: ckdmip_evaluation1_sw_fluxes_rel-180.h5  ckdmip_evaluation1_sw_fluxes_rel-280.h5 ckdmip_evaluation1_sw_fluxes_rel-415.h5  ckdmip_evaluation1_sw_fluxes_rel-560.h5 ckdmip_evaluation1_sw_fluxes_rel-1120.h5 ckdmip_evaluation1_sw_fluxes_rel-2240.h5

ckdmip_evaluation1_sw_fluxes_present.h5  ckdmip_evaluation1_sw_fluxes_ch4-350.h5 ckdmip_evaluation1_sw_fluxes_ch4-700.h5  ckdmip_evaluation1_sw_fluxes_ch4-1200.h5 ckdmip_evaluation1_sw_fluxes_ch4-2600.h5 ckdmip_evaluation1_sw_fluxes_ch4-3500.h5

next_required_work: Implement Julia/Reactant evaluation of calc_cost_function_ckd_lw and calc_cost_function_ckd_sw using these captured terms.
Run optimizer-only recovery for one published target and compare recovered weights/tables against the published CKD definition.
Promote the result into official_ecckd_training only after the quantitative recovery target is met.
